pi_items.source: setup_task.sh Python data generation script (adds exactly 3000ms per interval)

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated dataset created via a Python script in setup_task.sh. This script explicitly injects participant 'sub-99' as a contaminated entry exhibiting 'zero_variance_timing' (words generated at exactly 3000ms intervals). The verifier strictly enforces the output JSON file to be located at '/home/ga/pebl/analysis/fluency_report.json'.
